properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: To everyone who's lost someone they love Long before it was their time You feel like the days you had were not enough When you said goodbaye

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And to all of the people with burdens and pains Keeping you back from your life You believe that there's nothing and there is no one Who can make it right

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is hope for the Helpless Rest for the weary And love for the broken heart And there is grace and forgiveness Mercy and healing He'll meet you wherever you are Cry out to Jesus Cry out to Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the marriage that's struggling just to hang on They've lost all of their faith in love And they've done all thay can to make it right again Still its not enough

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For the ones who can't break addictions and chains You try to give up but you come back again just remember you're not alone in your pain and suffering.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When you're lonely And you feel like the whole world is falling on you You just reach out You just cry out to Jesus
